contents.value: <link="https://www.uvic.ca/"><color=#6CC1FC>University of Victoria (UVic)</color></link>, British Columbia, Canada.
Department: Computer Science and Engineering
Master of Science (2021 - 2023)

- Program: Computer Science (Co-op)
  - GPA: 9.0 (based on UVic's 9.0-point grading scale)
Bachelor of Science with Distinction (2016 - 2021)

- Program: Honours in Computer Science and Minor in Mathematics (Co-op)
  - GPA: 8.85
Awards

<link="https://www.uvic.ca/graduatestudies/finances/uvic-scholarships/index.php"><color=#6CC1FC>UVic Fellowship (2021)</color></link>
Awarded to graduate students of high academic standing.

<link="https://www.uvic.ca/ecs/about/deans-office/"><color=#6CC1FC>Department of Computer Science Honours Graduation Medal (2021)</color></link>
Awarded to the top graduating student in the Computer Science Honours program.

<link="https://www.uvic.ca/registrar/safa/in-course-scholarships/no-application/index.php"><color=#6CC1FC>UVic President’s Scholarship (2020)</color></link>
Awarded to academically outstanding undergraduate students in all faculties.

<link="https://www.uvic.ca/registrar/safa/in-course-scholarships/no-application/index.php"><color=#6CC1FC>UVic Undergraduate Scholarship (2020)</color></link>
Awarded to academically outstanding entering or continuing undergraduate students.

<link="https://www.uvic.ca/safa/scholarships/in-course-scholarships/sant-s-aulakh-memorial-scholarship.php"><color=#6CC1FC>UVic Sant S. Aulakh Memorial Scholarship (2019)</color></link>
Awarded to a student with the highest grade-point-average in the third year and entering the fourth year in the Faculty of Engineering.

<link="https://www.uvic.ca/registrar/safa/in-course-scholarships/no-application/index.php"><color=#6CC1FC>UVic Excellence Scholarship (2016 – 2019)</color></link>
Renewable entrance scholarship awarded to academically outstanding students.

<link="https://www.uvic.ca/science/assets/docs/deans_lists/DeansList2016-17.pdf"><color=#6CC1FC>UVic Dean’s List (2016/17)</color></link>
Recognizes top 10% of students in the Faculty of Science according to their year.

I am a graduate computer scientist and mathematician from the University of Victoria in British Columbia, Canada. I love to design and develop efficient solutions to complex problems, I believe simple solutions are often the best ones, and I believe communication and understanding one’s goals are critical parts of being an effective team member.

I desire to produce high quality work that sets the bar and contributes to society in a meaningful way. I am always seeking to understand concepts and systems at a deeper level, and I am ready and eager to learn from those around me. Overall, I want every person, system, and company I work with to be better off because of the encounter. I appreciate you taking the time to read about me, and I look forward to meeting you.
profilepic
Cloud Software Developer
AXYS Technologies Inc. Victoria, BC. May 2022 – Present

- Full stack development of a data standardization pipeline with an API and front-end management portal.
        - Implemented with ASP.NET Core w/ Telerik, Python, FastApi, SqlAlchemy, Alembic, and Redis among others.
        - Provisioned with IaC using AWS CDK for Python.
    - Engaged in system design, tool exploration, code reviews and agile processes such as stakeholder reviews.
Teaching Assistant
University of Victoria. Victoria, BC. Sep. 2019 – Apr. 2022

- Taught students the fundamentals of programming in C as a lab instructor and marker.
    - Marked and gave feedback on assignments for Algorithms and Data Structures course.
    - Taught business students the fundamentals of computing (topics included SQL, JavaScript, CSS, and HTML).
Software Developer (Co-op)
National Research Council of Canada: Herzberg Astronomy and Astrophysics Research Centre (Software Group) Victoria, BC. Jan. 2021 – Sep. 2021

- Worked in a team of seven to design, develop, and test HEART, a toolkit written in C that facilitates the development of real time control systems for adaptive optics in large telescopes across the world.
    - Contributed to a large project with many moving parts requiring concurrent programming, careful memory management, and object-oriented programming.
Web Application Developer (Co-op)
BC Ministry of Social Development and Poverty Reduction: Research Branch, Victoria, BC. May. 2020 – Aug. 2020

- Built a web application for data visualization using React and implemented a full test suite with Jest.
    - Performed full stack development, continuous code reviews and agile development processes.
Quality Assurance Analyst (Co-op)
Latitude Geographics (VertiGIS North America). Victoria, BC. May. 2019 – Aug. 2019

- Performed regression and manual feature testing as well as developed an automated testing suite.
    - Communicated frequently with developer and support teams to ensure top product quality.
Data Analyst (Co-op)
Slegg Building Materials. Victoria, BC. May. 2018 – Aug. 2018
- Summarized large reports on customers, inventory, and sales.
Student Painting Branch Manager
Scholars Edge Painting. Victoria, BC. Oct. 2016 – Sep. 2017

- Sought for, interviewed, hired, trained, and coordinated employees on a tight schedule.
    - Sold and produced over $77,000 worth of painting contracts from May to August of 2017.
